verified.description: false = a best-effort reconstruction pending cross-check against an authoritative lectionary index (see SOURCES.md); true once confirmed.

patristicReading.description: Nullable: Phase 7 allows omitting the second reading as an MVP fallback (Douay-Rheims has no patristic texts) - see TASKS.md Phase 7.

sourceRef.description: Free-text citation, e.g. 'St Augustine, Confessions, Bk 1' - not a scripture reference
